repeatabilityCalibration.note: A tolerance of 0 asserts perfectly repeatable scoring, which contradicts observed run-to-run noise on single-sample cells (close single-sample results are ties with no confidence). 0.03 is a conservative score-fraction noise floor: deltas at or below it should be read as ties, not improvements. Recalibrate from the median absolute deviation over repeated identical-config runs once multi-sample data exists (sweep-stats `mad`).
